listings.title: Osprey Atmos AG 65 Backpack
listings.shortDescription: 65L backpacking pack with Anti-Gravity suspension for long-distance comfort.
listings.fullDescription: Barely used Osprey Atmos AG 65 in great condition. The Anti-Gravity suspension system keeps this pack breathable and comfortable even on multi-day trips. Includes rain cover and hip belt pockets. Perfect for thru-hikes or weekend backpacking trips.

listings.title: Canon EOS R6 Mark II Camera
listings.shortDescription: Full-frame mirrorless camera with 24-70mm lens, great for landscapes and action.
listings.fullDescription: Canon EOS R6 Mark II body plus RF 24-70mm f/2.8 lens. Excellent low-light performance and fast autofocus, ideal for wildlife or adventure photography. Comes with two batteries, charger, and a 64GB SD card. Well maintained, no sensor dust.

listings.title: Burton Custom Snowboard 158cm
listings.shortDescription: All-mountain snowboard, 158cm, great for intermediate to advanced riders.
listings.fullDescription: Burton Custom, one of the most versatile all-mountain boards on the market. 158cm length suits riders 5'8"-6'2". Recently waxed and tuned, minor base scratches from normal use but no core damage. Bindings not included.

listings.title: Trek Fuel EX 8 Mountain Bike
listings.shortDescription: Full-suspension trail bike, size Large, ready for singletrack.
listings.fullDescription: Trek Fuel EX 8, 29-inch wheels, 130mm front / 130mm rear travel. Great for technical trails and all-day rides. Recently serviced with fresh brake pads and a tuned drivetrain. Frame size Large, fits riders 5'10"-6'2".

listings.title: Black Diamond Climbing Harness Set
listings.shortDescription: Complete harness, helmet, and belay device set for two climbers.
listings.fullDescription: Includes two Black Diamond Momentum harnesses (sizes M and L), one Half Dome helmet, and an ATC-Guide belay device with locking carabiner. Everything you need for a day at the crag. Inspected and in good working condition.

listings.title: Pelican Sentinel 100X Sit-On-Top Kayak
listings.shortDescription: Stable and durable sit-on-top kayak, perfect for lakes and calm rivers.
listings.fullDescription: Pelican Sentinel 100X, 10 feet long, great stability for beginners and casual paddlers. Includes paddle and a basic PFD. Minor scuffs on the hull from normal use, no cracks or repairs.
